## orch-go ask

Send a message to an existing session (alias for send)

### Synopsis

Send a message to an existing agent session. This is an alias for the 'send' command.

```
orch-go ask [session-id] [prompt] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for ask
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --server string   OpenCode server URL (default "http://127.0.0.1:4096")
```
